events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: decision is **fail** (high risk) — wrong phase tape colors violate NEC 200.6 (grounded conductor identification) and 210.5 (identification of ungrounded conductors/multiwire circuits), creating a shock/arc-flash hazard for anyone relying on color coding later. Corrective action is to re-tape at all accessible points and verify with a phase/continuity check before cover.
